'''âth-r-n''' ('''katharan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lyze|lyze]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-r-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lyze|lyze]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âth-r-n
|-
! Lemma
| katharan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitharan|thitharan]] || [[word:jitharan|jitharan]] || [[word:shitharan|shitharan]] || [[word:kitharan|kitharan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutharan|thuthutharan]] || [[word:jujutharan|jujutharan]] || [[word:shushutharan|shushutharan]] || [[word:kukutharan|kukutharan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutharan|thutharan]] || [[word:jutharan|jutharan]] || [[word:shutharan|shutharan]] || [[word:kutharan|kutharan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutharan|thutharan]] || [[word:jutharan|jutharan]] || [[word:shutharan|shutharan]] || [[word:kutharan|kutharan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetharan|thetharan]] || [[word:jetharan|jetharan]] || [[word:shetharan|shetharan]] || [[word:ketharan|ketharan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotharan|thothotharan]] || [[word:jojotharan|jojotharan]] || [[word:shoshotharan|shoshotharan]] || [[word:kokotharan|kokotharan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotharan|thotharan]] || [[word:jotharan|jotharan]] || [[word:shotharan|shotharan]] || [[word:kotharan|kotharan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotharan|thotharan]] || [[word:jotharan|jotharan]] || [[word:shotharan|shotharan]] || [[word:kotharan|kotharan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtharan|thĂŠtharan]] || [[word:jĂŠtharan|jĂŠtharan]] || [[word:shĂŠtharan|shĂŠtharan]] || [[word:kĂŠtharan|kĂŠtharan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatharan|thathatharan]] || [[word:jajatharan|jajatharan]] || [[word:shashatharan|shashatharan]] || [[word:kakatharan|kakatharan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatharan|thatharan]] || [[word:jatharan|jatharan]] || [[word:shatharan|shatharan]] || [[word:katharan|katharan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatharan|thatharan]] || [[word:jatharan|jatharan]] || [[word:shatharan|shatharan]] || [[word:katharan|katharan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shatharan|shatharan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshatharan|goshatharan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishatharan|gokishatharan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shatharanĂŒ|shatharanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshatharanknĂŒ|goshatharanknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishatharanĂŒ|gokishatharanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shatharanshĂ«|shatharanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshatharankshĂ«|goshatharankshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishatharanshĂ«|gokishatharanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatharanro|shatharanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatharankro|goshatharankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatharanro|gokishatharanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shatharanmu|shatharanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatharankmu|goshatharankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatharanmu|gokishatharanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shatharansher|shatharansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshatharanksher|goshatharanksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishatharansher|gokishatharansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shatharang|shatharang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshatharankng|goshatharankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishatharang|gokishatharang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shatharanya|shatharanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshatharankya|goshatharankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishatharanya|gokishatharanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shatharanyam|shatharanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshatharankyam|goshatharankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishatharanyam|gokishatharanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatharanĂŒshĂ«|shatharanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatharanknĂŒshĂ«|goshatharanknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatharanĂŒshĂ«|gokishatharanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatharanĂŒro|shatharanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatharanknĂŒro|goshatharanknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatharanĂŒro|gokishatharanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatharanĂŒmu|shatharanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatharanknĂŒmu|goshatharanknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatharanĂŒmu|gokishatharanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatharanshĂ«nĂŒ|shatharanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatharankshĂ«nĂŒ|goshatharankshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatharanshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishatharanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatharanshĂ«ro|shatharanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatharankshĂ«ro|goshatharankshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatharanshĂ«ro|gokishatharanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatharanshĂ«mu|shatharanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatharankshĂ«mu|goshatharankshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatharanshĂ«mu|gokishatharanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatharanronĂŒ|shatharanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatharankronĂŒ|goshatharankronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatharanronĂŒ|gokishatharanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatharanroshĂ«|shatharanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatharankroshĂ«|goshatharankroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatharanroshĂ«|gokishatharanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatharanromu|shatharanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatharankromu|goshatharankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatharanromu|gokishatharanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatharanmunĂŒ|shatharanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatharankmunĂŒ|goshatharankmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatharanmunĂŒ|gokishatharanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatharanmushĂ«|shatharanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatharankmushĂ«|goshatharankmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatharanmushĂ«|gokishatharanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatharanmuro|shatharanmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatharankmuro|goshatharankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatharanmuro|gokishatharanmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
